brandfetch.note: Brandfetch returned the 'Rijksoverheid' umbrella (not the EZK ministry) with role-confused colors — primary #000000 (dominant pixel), accent #154273 (the real Rijksoverheid donkerblauw, mislabeled). Low value for this government entity; identity sourced from rijksoverheid.nl + rijkshuisstijl.nl instead.

validation.method: authoritative rijksoverheid.nl / rijkshuisstijl.nl research (agent) + Brandfetch trust-gated
validation.bf_reliability: low — umbrella record, unclaimed q=0.54, role-confused colors

resolutions.truth: Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (EZK)
resolutions.evidence: The 2024 Schoof-cabinet split EZK -> EZ + KGG was REVERSED by the Jetten cabinet (Feb 2026); current official name is EZK — curated charter already correct, no change.
Official Rijkshuisstijl palette; BF found #154273 but mislabeled it as accent.
Official Rijksoverheid typefaces (web-only; OFL substitutes for OOXML/PDF embedding).

validation.notes: Ministry has no standalone domain (operates under rijksoverheid.nl). Social handles use 'MinisterieEZ'.
